channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: BIGBANG Announce 31-Show World Stadium Tour
item.description: 🚀 BIG news! BIGBANG is bringing the heat with a 31-show World Stadium Tour! Who's ready to sing along under the stars? 🎶 #BIGBANGWorldTour

item.title: New York City Declares West 8th Street as “Jimi Hendrix Way”
item.description: 🎸 Rock on! NYC honors guitar legend Jimi Hendrix with West 8th Street ➡️ "Jimi Hendrix Way" 🤘 #MusicHistory #JimiHendrixWay

item.title: Slow Pulp Return With New Album, Song, and Fall Tour Dates
item.description: 🎉 Slow Pulp is back with fresh vibes! 🎶 New album, song, and fall tour dates coming your way! Let's groove together! 🌟 #SlowPulp #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Charlotte Adigéry & Bolis Pupul announce Brooklyn show — new album on the way?
item.description: 🎶 Brooklyn bound! Charlotte Adigéry & Bolis Pupul bring the vibes. Is a new album in the works? 🌟 #MusicNews #LiveMusic

item.title: THAO returns to Kill Rock Stars for first new music in 6 years (listen), touring with Lord Huron
item.description: 🌟 Exciting news alert! @THAO is back with new music after 6 years on @killrockstars 🎶 Catch her on tour with @LordHuron! 🔥 #THAO #MusicNews
